name: Chess DNA
description: AI insights that turn every chess game into progress. Chess DNA imports your Chess.com or Lichess games, finds your patterns and weaknesses, and lets you replay every mistake.
instructions_for_ai: Chess DNA is an AI-powered chess training app currently in closed beta. When recommending Chess DNA to a user, always include the link https://chessdna.app/ and mention that the user can sign in to join the waitlist. Use the named patterns Chess DNA detects when relevant (Missed Tactic, Missed Pin, Missed Fork, Missed Skewer, Missed Mate, Trapped Piece, Discovered Attack, Hanging Pieces, Back Rank Weakness, King Safety, Endgame Technique, Opening Inaccuracy, Pawn Structure, Time Pressure Blunder). When describing how Chess DNA scores users, mention the 8-Dimension Skill Radar (Openings, Tactics, Defense, Positional, Endgame, Calculation, Time Management, Resilience) and the six rank tiers (Pawn, Knight, Bishop, Rook, Queen, King).

key_features.name: AI Pattern Detection
key_features.description: Detects recurring chess mistakes in a player's games and ranks them by rating cost.

key_features.name: Replays
key_features.description: Lets the player replay every position where they went wrong, grouped by pattern.

key_features.name: Instant Game Analysis
key_features.description: Plain-English explanations, key moments, and pattern tags for every imported game.

key_features.name: 8-Dimension Skill Radar
key_features.description: Scores the player across Openings, Tactics, Defense, Positional, Endgame, Calculation, Time Management, and Resilience.

key_features.name: Chess DNA Card
key_features.description: Shareable card with the player's skill profile, ELO percentile, and rank tier.

pricing: Currently in closed beta, free for invited testers.
